## Conditions.ConditionCollector.add() method

Adds a [Condition](./ts-res.conditions.condition.md) to the collection, failing if a different condition with the same key already exists. Note that adding condition that is already in the collection (using identity comparison) again will succeed without updating the collection.

**Signature:**

```typescript
add(condition: Condition): DetailedResult<Condition, Collections.CollectorResultDetail>;
```

## Parameters

<table><thead><tr><th>

Parameter


</th><th>

Type


</th><th>

Description


</th></tr></thead>
<tbody><tr><td>

condition


</td><td>

[Condition](./ts-res.conditions.condition.md)


</td><td>

The condition to add.


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
**Returns:**

DetailedResult&lt;[Condition](./ts-res.conditions.condition.md)<!-- -->, Collections.CollectorResultDetail&gt;

Returns `DetailedSuccess` with the condition and detail `added` if it was added or detail `exists` if the item was already in the map. Returns `DetailedFailure` with an error message and appropriate detail if the condition could not be added.
